====Pokémon====
This listing is of Marshal's known Pokémon in the Pokémon Adventures manga.
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Marshal
|pkmn=Throh
|type1=Fighting
|gender=male
|img=Marshal Throh Adventures.png
|epnum=PS486
|epname=Unraveling Mysteries
|desc={{p|Throh}} is Marshal's first known Pokémon. He was used to battle {{adv|Black}}'s {{p|Pignite}}, [[Bo|Nite]], in Nimbasa City, where he easily won.

Throh's only known move is {{m|Storm Throw}}, and his Ability is {{a|Guts}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Marshal
|pkmn=Sawk
|type1=Fighting
|gender=male
|img=Marshal Sawk Adventures.png
|epnum=PS486
|epname=Unraveling Mysteries
|desc={{p|Sawk}} is Marshal's second known Pokémon. He was used to battle Black's {{p|Braviary}}, [[Brav]], in Nimbasa City, where he easily won. During [[Team Plasma]]'s attack on the League, Marshal used Sawk to battle {{p|Landorus}}. With the power of [[Caitlin]]'s {{p|Gothitelle}} and its {{m|Telekinesis}}, Sawk and Marshal were able to float in the air.

Sawk's known moves are {{m|Retaliate}} and {{m|Karate Chop}}, and his Ability is {{a|Sturdy}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Marshal
|pkmn=Mienshao
|type1=Fighting
|img=Marshal Mienshao Adventures.png
|epnum=PS486
|epname=Unraveling Mysteries
|desc={{p|Mienshao}} is Marshal's third known Pokémon. It was used to battle [[Alder]]'s {{p|Accelgor}} at the [[Battle Subway]]. Despite its quick speed, Mienshao was defeated by Accelgor's {{m|Acid Spray}}.

Mienshao's only known move is {{m|Pound}}, and its Ability is {{a|Inner Focus}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Marshal
|pkmn=Conkeldurr
|type1=Fighting
|img=Marshal Conkeldurr Adventures.png
|epnum=PS511
|epname=Dream a Little Dream
|desc={{p|Conkeldurr}} is Marshal's fourth known Pokémon. It was first seen with its Trainer at the Pokémon League. Later, it was used to battle [[Colress|Hood Man]]'s {{p|Tornadus}}, {{p|Thundurus}}, and {{p|Landorus}}.

None of Conkeldurr's moves are known.}}

=====Released=====
{{TrainerPoké
|main=Costa
|trainer=Marshal
|pkmn=Tirtouga
|gender=male
|type1=Water
|type2=Rock
|img=Marshal Tirtouga Adventures.png
|epnum=PS488
|epname=Growing Pains
|desc=Marshal had owned a {{p|Tirtouga}} sometime before arriving in [[Nimbasa City]]. Because of his hard-to-control nature, he had released him the day before meeting Black and White. He was later captured by Black and named Costa.}}
